produces: smtc-reader.ps1 — PowerShell SMTC sidecar emitting line-delimited JSON.

assertion_coverage.evidence: Script contains both literal strings 'Windows.Media.Control' and 'GlobalSystemMediaTransportControlsSessionManager' on the WinRT assembly load line.

Filter uses case-insensitive regex match -match 'AppleMusic' against SourceAppUserModelId. Per assertion source: external_source_unreachable, the exact AppId is not canonically published; this is the documented best-effort heuristic.
Register-ObjectEvent call sites present for SessionsChanged, CurrentSessionChanged, MediaPropertiesChanged, PlaybackInfoChanged.

rationale: Pure WinRT via PowerShell — no native module, no NodeRT dependency. PowerShell is preinstalled on every supported Windows version (per probe-ip2 rationale).
